description: T-015 — Golden eval dataset for ABS RAG multi-tenancy E2E. Each row defines a tenant, a corpus document, and a query/expected-doc-id pair the retriever should hit at top-K.

entries.text: Acme charges customers monthly. Invoices arrive on the first business day. Late payments incur a 2% fee per 30 days.

queries.q: What's the late-payment fee at Acme?

entries.text: New Acme staff complete a two-day onboarding programme. Day one covers ABS RAG, day two focuses on customer escalation playbooks.
Globex Q3 roadmap targets the EU expansion: Madrid in July, Paris in August, Berlin in September. Each launch needs a localised privacy notice.

queries.q: What cities does Globex Q3 cover?

entries.text: Globex vendors of record: Cohere for reranking, Qdrant for vectors, Stripe for billing, AWS for hosting.

cross_tenant_probe.description: Probes that MUST never surface cross-tenant content.
